en.extract:
The scarlet-breasted dacnis (Dacnis berlepschi) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Colombia and Ecuador. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''scarlet-breasted dacnis''' ('''''Dacnis berlepschi''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]]. It is found in [[Colombia]] and [[Ecuador]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
